title: dForce Network - REKT
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack exploiting virtual price manipulation through flash loans on Curve pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls remove_liquidity() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: flash loan followed by remove_liquidity on Curve pools
monitoring_rules: BLOCK remove_liquidity() if preceded by a flash loan in the same transaction
summary: The attacker exploited a reentrancy vulnerability by using flash loaned funds to manipulate the virtual price on Curve pools, resulting in a loss of $3.65M across Arbitrum and Optimism. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing remove_liquidity() calls after a flash loan.
